title: Saker 42 in 1 Magnetic Screwdriver Set, Multi Bit Free Combination Ratchet Screwdriver Set Portable Repair Tool Kit for Gifts, Furniture, Computer, Bicycle and DIY Grey
features: 【42 in 1 Magnetic Screwdriver Set】Saker ratchet screwdriver equipped with 8 pcs 45mm long screwdriver heads and 32 pcs 25mm short screwdrivers (PH, SL, PZ, U-shaped, etc.).The screw driver set kit also has an ergonomic T handle that provides a comfortable grip. It can help you easily complete various household tasks, such as furniture assembly, household appliance maintenance, bicycle fixing, and other repair work.

【T Handle Ratchet Screwdriver】Saker 42 in 1 screwdriver set includes a ratchet screwdriver with an ergonomic ratchet design that allows for easy switching between forward, backward, and locking modes. It can easily tighten or loosen screws, saving you time and effort. If necessary, you can also stack screwdriver heads to obtain longer screwdrivers.

【Durable and Long-lasting Material】In the 42 in 1 magnetic screwdriver set, the T-shaped handle is made of aluminum alloy, and the drill bit is made of S2 alloy steel, which is durable, hard but not brittle, ensuring that it can be used for a long time. The screwdriver head and screwdriver handle can withstand frequency, ensuring durability and long-lasting performance.

【Magnetic Design】Magnetic screwdriver set all drill bits are strongly magnetized to ensure quick and easy replacement of the drill bits while firmly securing the screws in place. Ensure that the batch head does not fall off according to various usage environments, making you more efficient when assembling small tools, cars, or repairing work.
【Portable Design】Saker Screwdriver set comes with a storage box, compact and portable, allowing you to carry it with you anytime, whether at home or on the go for emergency repairs.
